title: euphrasia stricta subsp. pseudosuecica
intro: Euphrasia stricta subsp. pseudosuecica, also known as Swedish eye grass, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae, typically found in the mountainous regions of northern Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Euphrasia stricta subsp. pseudosuecica include its ability to soothe eye irritations, improve vision, and reduce symptoms of hay fever, making it a popular herbal remedy for eye problems and allergies. Euphrasia stricta subsp. pseudosuecica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried flowers, infusions, tinctures, and eye drops, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
